<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">

<style>
@import url("https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cinzel:wght@400;700;900&family=Lato:wght@300;400;700&display=swap");
:root{--gold:#c9a84c;--dark:#0a0a0f;--red:#cc0000;--light:#f5e6c8;--green:#25d366;}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{font-family:"Lato",sans-serif;background:var(--dark);color:var(--light);overflow-x:hidden;}
#particles{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:0;}

/* URGENCY BAR */
.urgency-bar{
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,#8b0000,#cc0000,#8b0000);
  color:#fff;text-align:center;padding:0.6rem 1rem;
  font-size:0.88rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;
  position:relative;z-index:200;
  animation:bar-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes bar-pulse{0%,100%{background-position:0%}50%{background-position:100%}}
.urgency-bar a{color:#fff;text-decoration:none;}
.urgency-bar span{animation:blink 1s step-start infinite;}
@keyframes blink{50%{opacity:0;}}

/* HEADER */
header{position:relative;text-align:center;min-height:100vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:1;overflow:hidden;}
.hero-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at center,#2a0a3e 0%,#0a0a0f 70%);z-index:0;}
.stars{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:
  radial-gradient(1px 1px at 10% 20%,rgba(255,255,255,.8) 0%,transparent 100%),
  radial-gradient(1px 1px at 30% 50%,rgba(255,255,255,.6) 0%,transparent 100%),
  radial-gradient(1px 1px at 50% 10%,rgba(255,255,255,.9) 0%,transparent 100%),
  radial-gradient(1px 1px at 70% 30%,rgba(255,255,255,.7) 0%,transparent 100%),
  radial-gradient(1px 1px at 90% 60%,rgba(255,255,255,.8) 0%,transparent 100%),
  radial-gradient(1px 1px at 20% 80%,rgba(255,255,255,.5) 0%,transparent 100%),
  radial-gradient(2px 2px at 40% 40%,rgba(201,168,76,.8) 0%,transparent 100%),
  radial-gradient(2px 2px at 75% 15%,rgba(201,168,76,.6) 0%,transparent 100%);
  animation:twinkle 4s ease-in-out infinite alternate;}
@keyframes twinkle{0%{opacity:.5}100%{opacity:1}}
.hero-content{position:relative;z-index:2;padding:2rem;max-width:900px;margin:0 auto;}
.gold-line{width:120px;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--gold),transparent);margin:1rem auto;animation:pline 2s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes pline{0%,100%{width:80px;opacity:.6}50%{width:200px;opacity:1}}
.hero-title{font-family:"Cinzel",serif;font-size:clamp(2.2rem,6vw,4.5rem);font-weight:900;color:var(--gold);animation:glow-t 3s ease-in-out infinite alternate;letter-spacing:4px;line-height:1.1;}
@keyframes glow-t{0%{text-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(201,168,76,.6)}100%{text-shadow:0 0 50px rgba(201,168,76,1),0 0 100px rgba(201,168,76,.5)}}
.hero-sub{font-family:"Cinzel",serif;font-size:clamp(1rem,2.5vw,1.4rem);color:#ddd;margin:.7rem 0;letter-spacing:3px;}
.hero-years{display:inline-block;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#c9a84c,#8b6914);color:#fff;padding:.5rem 2.5rem;border-radius:50px;font-size:1rem;margin:1rem 0;font-weight:700;box-shadow:0 0 25px rgba(201,168,76,.6);animation:float 3s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes float{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-10px)}}
.hero-photo-wrapper{position:relative;margin:1.5rem auto;width:280px;height:280px;}
.ring1{position:absolute;inset:-15px;border-radius:50%;border:2px dashed rgba(201,168,76,.5);animation:spin 12s linear infinite;}
.ring2{position:absolute;inset:-5px;border-radius:50%;border:3px solid var(--gold);animation:spin 6s linear infinite reverse;opacity:.6;}
@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
.hero-photo{width:280px;height:280px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;border:4px solid var(--gold);position:relative;z-index:1;box-shadow:0 0 50px rgba(201,168,76,.7),0 0 100px rgba(201,168,76,.3);}
.hero-desc{font-size:1.1rem;max-width:620px;margin:.8rem auto 1.5rem;color:#ddd;line-height:1.85;}
.hero-badges{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;gap:.6rem;margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
.badge{background:rgba(201,168,76,.15);border:1px solid var(--gold);border-radius:50px;padding:.35rem 1rem;font-size:.8rem;color:var(--gold);font-weight:700;}
.btn-wa{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#25d366,#128c7e);color:#fff;padding:1rem 2.5rem;border-radius:50px;text-decoration:none;font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700;box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(37,211,102,.6);transition:all .3s;animation:pulse-wa 2s ease-in-out infinite;}
.btn-wa:hover{transform:scale(1.05);}
@keyframes pulse-wa{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(37,211,102,.4)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 50px rgba(37,211,102,.9)}}
.scroll-hint{margin-top:2rem;color:rgba(201,168,76,.6);font-size:.8rem;letter-spacing:3px;animation:float 2s ease-in-out infinite;}

/* NAV */
nav{position:sticky;top:0;background:rgba(8,8,12,.97);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border-bottom:2px solid var(--gold);z-index:100;padding:.8rem 1rem;text-align:center;}
nav a{color:var(--gold);text-decoration:none;margin:0 .7rem;font-size:.8rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;transition:all .3s;}
nav a:hover{color:#fff;}

/* SECTIONS */
.bg-s{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#0a0a0f 0%,#110a1a 50%,#0a0a0f 100%);width:100%;padding:5rem 0;}
.bg-d{background:#060608;width:100%;padding:5rem 0;}
.bg-b{background:#030305;width:100%;padding:5rem 0;}
section{position:relative;z-index:1;padding:0 1.5rem;max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;}
.section-title{font-family:"Cinzel",serif;font-size:clamp(1.5rem,3vw,2.5rem);color:var(--gold);text-align:center;margin-bottom:.5rem;text-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(201,168,76,.5);}
.section-sub{text-align:center;color:#bbb;font-size:1rem;max-width:650px;margin:0 auto .5rem;line-height:1.7;}
.divider{width:80px;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--gold),transparent);margin:.8rem auto 2.5rem;}

/* STATS BAND */
.stats-band{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(150px,1fr));gap:1.5rem;margin-bottom:3rem;}
.stat-card{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a0a2e,#0d0d1a);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.3);border-radius:14px;padding:1.8rem 1rem;text-align:center;transition:all .3s;}
.stat-card:hover{border-color:var(--gold);transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(201,168,76,.2);}
.stat-num{font-family:"Cinzel",serif;font-size:2.2rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--gold);display:block;}
.stat-label{font-size:.85rem;color:#bbb;margin-top:.3rem;}

/* SERVICES */
.services-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(220px,1fr));gap:1.2rem;}
.service-card{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a0a2e,#0d0d1a);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.2);border-radius:16px;padding:1.8rem 1.2rem;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .35s;text-decoration:none;display:block;color:var(--light);position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.service-card::after{content:"→ Clique para falar";position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;background:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(201,168,76,.2),transparent);padding:.5rem;font-size:.7rem;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:1px;transform:translateY(100%);transition:transform .3s;}
.service-card:hover{border-color:var(--gold);transform:translateY(-6px);box-shadow:0 15px 40px rgba(201,168,76,.3);}
.service-card:hover::after{transform:translateY(0);}
.s-icon{font-size:2.8rem;margin-bottom:.8rem;display:block;}
.s-num{font-family:"Cinzel",serif;font-size:.7rem;color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:3px;}
.s-name{font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;margin:.3rem 0;}
.s-desc{font-size:.8rem;color:#aaa;margin-top:.4rem;line-height:1.5;}

/* AMARRAÇÃO */
.am-wrap{padding:0 1.5rem;max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;}
.am-box{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a0000,#2a0000,#0a0000);border:2px solid #cc0000;border-radius:20px;padding:3rem 2rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.am-box::before{content:"❤️";position:absolute;font-size:20rem;opacity:.04;right:-3rem;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);pointer-events:none;}
.am-title{font-family:"Cinzel",serif;font-size:clamp(1.6rem,3.5vw,2.8rem);color:#ff3333;text-align:center;text-shadow:0 0 25px rgba(255,51,51,.7);margin-bottom:.5rem;}
.am-badge{background:var(--red);color:#fff;padding:.5rem 2rem;border-radius:50px;font-size:.95rem;font-weight:700;margin:.5rem auto 1.5rem;display:table;animation:pred 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;box-shadow:0 0 25px rgba(204,0,0,.7);}
@keyframes pred{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(204,0,0,.5)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 45px rgba(204,0,0,1)}}
.am-text{font-size:1.05rem;line-height:1.9;color:#f5c6c6;text-align:center;max-width:820px;margin:0 auto;}
.am-text strong{color:#ff4444;}
.am-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(180px,1fr));gap:1rem;margin-top:2rem;}
.am-item{background:rgba(204,0,0,.1);border:1px solid rgba(204,0,0,.3);border-radius:12px;padding:1.2rem;text-align:center;font-size:.9rem;transition:all .3s;}
.am-item:hover{background:rgba(204,0,0,.25);transform:translateY(-3px);}
.am-item .ico{font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:.4rem;display:block;}
.btn-red{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#cc0000,#ff4444);color:#fff;padding:1rem 2.5rem;border-radius:50px;text-decoration:none;font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700;box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(204,0,0,.7);transition:all .3s;animation:pred 2s ease-in-out infinite;}
.btn-red:hover{transform:scale(1.05);}

/* PORQUE ESCOLHER */
.why-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(240px,1fr));gap:1.5rem;}
.why-card{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0d0d1a,#1a0a2e);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.2);border-radius:16px;padding:2rem 1.5rem;transition:all .3s;}
.why-card:hover{border-color:var(--gold);transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(201,168,76,.2);}
.why-icon{font-size:2.5rem;margin-bottom:1rem;}
.why-title{font-family:"Cinzel",serif;font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:.6rem;}
.why-text{font-size:.9rem;color:#bbb;line-height:1.7;}

/* ABOUT */
.about-band{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0d0d1a,#1a0a2e);border-radius:20px;padding:3rem 2rem;display:flex;gap:2.5rem;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.2);}
.about-photo{width:230px;height:230px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;border:4px solid var(--gold);flex-shrink:0;box-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(201,168,76,.5);margin:0 auto;}
.about-text h3{font-family:"Cinzel",serif;font-size:1.5rem;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:1rem;}
.about-text p{font-size:.98rem;line-height:1.9;color:#ccc;margin-bottom:.8rem;}
.about-list{list-style:none;margin:1rem 0;}
.about-list li{padding:.4rem 0;color:#ddd;font-size:.95rem;}
.about-list li::before{content:"✅ ";}

/* URGENCY BOX */
.urgency-box{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0a1a0a,#0d1f0d);border:2px solid #25d366;border-radius:16px;padding:2rem;text-align:center;margin:2rem 0;}
.urgency-title{font-family:"Cinzel",serif;font-size:1.4rem;color:#25d366;margin-bottom:.5rem;}
.urgency-text{color:#bbb;font-size:.95rem;line-height:1.7;}

/* GALLERY */
.gallery-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(130px,1fr));gap:1rem;}
.gallery-item{border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.2);transition:all .3s;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0d0d1a,#1a0a2e);aspect-ratio:1;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-direction:column;font-size:3rem;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;}
.gallery-item:hover{border-color:var(--gold);transform:scale(1.06) rotate(2deg);box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(201,168,76,.3);}
.gallery-item span{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--gold);margin-top:.4rem;font-family:"Cinzel",serif;}

/* TESTIMONIALS */
.t-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:1.5rem;}
.t-card{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a0a2e,#0d0d1a);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.2);border-radius:16px;padding:1.8rem;position:relative;transition:all .3s;}
.t-card:hover{border-color:var(--gold);transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(201,168,76,.2);}
.t-card::before{content:"\201C";position:absolute;top:-5px;left:18px;font-size:4rem;color:var(--gold);font-family:serif;line-height:1;opacity:.8;}
.stars-r{color:#ffd700;font-size:1.1rem;margin-bottom:.6rem;}
.t-text{font-size:.95rem;line-height:1.7;color:#ddd;margin-bottom:1rem;}
.t-author{font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);font-size:.88rem;}

/* FAQ */
.faq-item{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0d0d1a,#1a0a2e);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.2);border-radius:14px;margin-bottom:1rem;overflow:hidden;}
.faq-q{padding:1.2rem 1.5rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);cursor:pointer;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;font-size:.95rem;transition:background .3s;}
.faq-q:hover{background:rgba(201,168,76,.08);}
.faq-q .arr{font-size:1.2rem;transition:transform .3s;}
.faq-a{padding:0 1.5rem 1.2rem;color:#bbb;font-size:.9rem;line-height:1.8;display:none;}
.faq-item.open .faq-a{display:block;}
.faq-item.open .arr{transform:rotate(180deg);}

/* PROMISE */
.promise-band{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(180px,1fr));gap:1rem;}
.promise-item{text-align:center;padding:1.5rem 1rem;}
.promise-icon{font-size:2.5rem;margin-bottom:.8rem;display:block;}
.promise-title{font-family:"Cinzel",serif;font-size:.95rem;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:.4rem;}
.promise-text{font-size:.82rem;color:#aaa;line-height:1.6;}

/* CTA FINAL */
.cta-final{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a0a2e,#2a0a3e);border:2px solid var(--gold);border-radius:24px;padding:3.5rem 2rem;text-align:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.cta-final::before{content:"✨";position:absolute;font-size:12rem;opacity:.05;left:-2rem;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);}
.cta-final::after{content:"✨";position:absolute;font-size:12rem;opacity:.05;right:-2rem;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);}
.cta-title{font-family:"Cinzel",serif;font-size:clamp(1.5rem,3vw,2.5rem);color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:1rem;animation:glow-t 3s ease-in-out infinite alternate;}
.cta-text{font-size:1.05rem;color:#ccc;max-width:650px;margin:0 auto 2rem;line-height:1.8;}
.btn-gold{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#c9a84c,#8b6914);color:#fff;padding:1rem 2.5rem;border-radius:50px;text-decoration:none;font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700;box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(201,168,76,.5);transition:all .3s;}
.btn-gold:hover{transform:scale(1.05);box-shadow:0 0 50px rgba(201,168,76,.9);}

/* TICKER */
.ticker-container{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#080008,#0a0500,#080008);border-top:2px solid var(--gold);border-bottom:2px solid var(--gold);padding:.9rem 0;overflow:hidden;position:relative;z-index:10;}
.ticker-track{display:flex;width:max-content;animation:ticker 40s linear infinite;}
.ticker-track:hover{animation-play-state:paused;}
@keyframes ticker{0%{transform:translateX(0)}100%{transform:translateX(-50%)}}
.ti{display:flex;align-items:center;white-space:nowrap;padding:0 2.5rem;font-family:"Cinzel",serif;font-size:.88rem;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:2px;}
.dot{width:8px;height:8px;background:var(--gold);border-radius:50%;margin-right:2.5rem;animation:pdot 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes pdot{0%,100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:.6}50%{transform:scale(1.6);opacity:1}}

/* FOOTER */
footer{background:#060608;border-top:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.2);padding:3rem 1rem;text-align:center;position:relative;z-index:5;}
.footer-logo{font-family:"Cinzel",serif;font-size:1.5rem;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:.5rem;}
.footer-links{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;gap:.5rem;margin:1.5rem 0;}
.footer-link{color:var(--gold);text-decoration:none;font-size:.85rem;padding:.4rem 1.2rem;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.3);border-radius:50px;transition:all .3s;}
.footer-link:hover{background:rgba(201,168,76,.1);border-color:var(--gold);}

/* FLOATING WA */
.whatsapp-float{position:fixed;bottom:28px;right:22px;z-index:9999;animation:bounce-wa 2.5s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes bounce-wa{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0) scale(1)}50%{transform:translateY(-12px) scale(1.04)}}
.whatsapp-float a{display:flex;align-items:center;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#25d366,#128c7e);color:#fff;text-decoration:none;padding:.85rem 1.3rem;border-radius:50px;box-shadow:0 4px 30px rgba(37,211,102,.7);font-weight:700;font-size:.92rem;gap:.6rem;transition:all .3s;}
.whatsapp-float a:hover{transform:scale(1.06);}
.wa-icon{font-size:1.7rem;}
.wa-pulse{position:absolute;top:-6px;right:-6px;width:22px;height:22px;background:#ff0000;border-radius:50%;animation:ping 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.65rem;font-weight:900;color:#fff;border:2px solid var(--dark);}
@keyframes ping{0%,100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:1}50%{transform:scale(1.3);opacity:.8}}

/* UTILS */
.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(35px);transition:opacity .9s ease,transform .9s ease;}
.reveal.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}
.flicker{display:inline-block;animation:flk 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes flk{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.6}80%{opacity:.4}}
.center{text-align:center;margin-top:2rem;}
.mt2{margin-top:2rem;}
@media(max-width:600px){
  nav a{margin:0 .4rem;font-size:.7rem;}
  .about-band{flex-direction:column;text-align:center;}
  .whatsapp-float a span:not(.wa-icon){display:none;}
  .whatsapp-float a{border-radius:50%;width:65px;height:65px;justify-content:center;padding:0;}
  .wa-icon{font-size:2.2rem;}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<canvas id="particles"></canvas>

      Faço e desfaço qualquer tipo de trabalho espiritual — com sigilo total e resultados comprovados.

      <span class="badge">✅ +20 Anos de Experiência</span>

      <span class="badge">⚡ Resultados Rápidos</span>

      <p>Pai Diego de Oxóssi é um dos pais de santo mais experientes e respeitados do Brasil. Com mais de <strong style="color:var(--gold);">20 anos dedicados à espiritualidade</strong>, nas tradições sagradas da Umbanda e do Candomblé, ele carrega em seus trabalhos uma força espiritual única, genuína e comprovada por milhares de pessoas.</p>
      <p>Filho consagrado de <strong style="color:var(--gold);">Oxóssi</strong> — o poderoso Orixá da caça, da abundância e da proteção — Pai Diego herdou a sabedoria dos ancestrais e a usa para transformar vidas, abrir caminhos e restaurar o amor de quem procura sua ajuda com fé.</p>
      <p>Ao longo de mais de duas décadas, já atendeu milhares de consulentes em todo o Brasil, devolvendo amor, paz, prosperidade e esperança para famílias que estavam à beira do colapso.</p>

<script>
// PARTICLES
const canvas = document.getElementById("particles");
const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");
function resize(){canvas.width=window.innerWidth;canvas.height=window.innerHeight;}
resize();
window.addEventListener("resize",resize);
const pts=[];
for(let i=0;i<100;i++){
  pts.push({x:Math.random()*canvas.width,y:Math.random()*canvas.height,
    r:Math.random()*1.8+.3,dx:(Math.random()-.5)*.35,dy:(Math.random()-.5)*.35,
    c:Math.random()>.5?"rgba(201,168,76,":"rgba(255,255,255,",a:Math.random()*.5+.15});
}
function draw(){
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);
  pts.forEach(p=>{
    p.x+=p.dx;p.y+=p.dy;
    if(p.x<0||p.x>canvas.width)p.dx*=-1;
    if(p.y<0||p.y>canvas.height)p.dy*=-1;
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(p.x,p.y,p.r,0,Math.PI*2);
    ctx.fillStyle=p.c+p.a+")";ctx.fill();
  });
  requestAnimationFrame(draw);
}
draw();

// SCROLL REVEAL
const obs=new IntersectionObserver(entries=>{
  entries.forEach(e=>{if(e.isIntersecting)e.target.classList.add("visible");});
},{threshold:.08});
document.querySelectorAll(".reveal").forEach(el=>obs.observe(el));
</script>
</body>
